notes.title: Native replay viewer, player guide, and launch-shell polish
notes.summary: Added a browser-native in-game replay viewer with local recent runs, introduced a player-focused guide and in-game controls/help overlays, promoted bug reporting and utility actions into the icon rail, improved wait-mode and centered message presentation, and tightened the beta-to-production release path.

notes.title: Aurora production lane and public beta split
notes.summary: Established Aurora Galactica as the official production URL, published a distinct production-beta lane, preserved legacy Codex bookmarks with redirects, and clarified release labeling so public players no longer see alpha branding on the live build.

notes.title: Capture clarity, boss feedback, and 1.0 release focus
notes.summary: Improved rescue-versus-destroy feedback, strengthened ship-hit and boss first-hit cues, aligned the carried-fighter attack position with the original game, and promoted visible special squadron bonuses into the four-stage 1.0 release plan.

notes.title: Build identity, settings drawer, and roadmap sync
notes.summary: Replaced the floating tools stack with a settings drawer, added stamped build identity, and aligned the project with an explicit release policy and roadmap.

notes.title: Results screen and challenge bonus pass
notes.summary: Added the Galaga-style results screen before initials entry and introduced manual-backed challenge-stage group bonus behavior.
